nodes.label: Dograh app stack for Hostinger VPS
nodes.rationale: Single self-contained file with named volumes only (no host bind-mounts, no init/sidecar) so a catalog compose-import works; no bundled nginx or cloudflared since managed Traefik is the ingress; web tier publishes no host ports (Traefik reaches them over its Docker network) while coturn is the only host-port service because WebRTC media is UDP and cannot traverse an HTTP reverse proxy; FASTAPI_WORKERS pinned to 1 because a managed Traefik can only target one port and the container runs singletons (telephony ARI manager, campaign orchestrator) plus migrations that must run exactly once.
